history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 7, column D, facing north. Directly ahead is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. The only safe adjacent cell is to my right (east) at (7, E), which is floor. I need to turn right to face east so I can move into that safe cell and continue exploring.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing east. The cell ahead (7,E) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. To my left (north) at (6,D) is a floor cell (.), while my right (south) is off-grid and west (7,C) is lava (L). The only safe direction to go is north. Therefore, I need to turn left to face north, then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,D) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To my right (east) is a floor cell at (7,E), which is safe. To my left (west) is a wall, so the only viable direction is to turn right and then move forward. This will allow me to explore eastward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing east. Ahead (7,E) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To my left (north) at (6,D) is a floor cell, which is safe. To my right (south) is off-grid and behind (west) is lava. The best option is to turn left to face north, then I can move forward onto the safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>

</thought>
<action>

</action>

<action>TURN_RIGHT</action>

The agent is at D7 facing east. The cell directly east (E7) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The only safe adjacent cells are north (D6, floor) and possibly south (out of bounds). Turning left will make me face north, allowing me to move forward to the safe floor cell. This will lead me into an unexplored area where I might find the goal.
</thought>
